ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "primary_stroke" TEXT /* Primary stroke type of the athlete */,
  "secondary_stroke" TEXT /* Secondary stroke type of the athlete */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete joined the team */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the athlete is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach for the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home base */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 100 Y Free) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the event in yards */,
  "stroke_type" TEXT /* Type of stroke for the event (e.g., Freestyle, Breaststroke) */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the event season starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the event season ends */,
  "is_championship" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is a championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who participated */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score received by the athlete */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded based on performance */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the athlete to complete the event */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place the athlete finished in the event */,
  "race_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the athlete to complete the race */,
  "split_time" TEXT /* Split times for different parts of the race */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video footage of the race */,
  "is_personal_best" INTEGER /* Indicates if this was the athlete's personal best time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event scheduled */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is being broadcast live */,
  "live_url" TEXT /* URL for live streaming the event */,
  "is_cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event has been cancelled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_schedule_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the coach */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any relevant certifications the coach holds */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the coach is active */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training session conducted by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video footage */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result associated with the video */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video content */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the video */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video is private or public */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Coach, Athlete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete the report is for */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details and insights from the performance report */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video footage of the race */,
  "coach_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the coach on the athlete's performance */,
  "athlete_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the athlete on their performance */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is private or public */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* URLs of any additional attachments (e.g., PDFs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Freestyle, Breaststroke) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "is_olympic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event type is part of the Olympic program */,
  "is_paralympic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event type is part of the Paralympic program */,
  "is_relay" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event type is a relay event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
